title: Startup Go Camp: Exceptional student outcomes
summary: The 90.4/100 student rating at Duke Kunshan University's Startup Go Camp demonstrates the effectiveness of combining classic business cases with personal experience, supported by 4-hour weekly Office Hours for high-quality student interaction.
evidenceMove: The DKU institutional article provides comprehensive documentation of course structure, teaching methodology, and student outcomes, making this the strongest evidenced chapter.
nextUpgrade: Additional student testimonials or project outcomes would further strengthen the impact narrative.

title: Inner Journey: 25+ years, 1000+ lives transformed
summary: Inner Journey represents a proven approach to helping founders and leaders align inner development with outer achievement, based on ancient wisdom with a holistic and measurable methodology.
evidenceMove: The organizational website provides direct evidence of program scope and impact, supported by the DKU article's identification of Kehan Dong as Inner Journey founder.
nextUpgrade: Participant testimonials or case studies would add depth to the transformational impact narrative.

title: Building systems around early founders and education
summary: Kehan Dong's current work integrates angel investing, educational program development, and organizational founding into a comprehensive system supporting unconventional paths to meaningful work.
evidenceMove: The personal website clearly articulates the philosophy and approach, while the DKU article demonstrates practical application through SGC.
nextUpgrade: Portfolio company examples or specific investment case studies would strengthen the angel investing narrative.
